deploy.releaseCommand: python -c "from backend.extensions import db; from sqlalchemy import text; from backend.config import get_config; from flask import Flask; app = Flask(__name__); app.config.from_object(get_config('production')); db.init_app(app); app.app_context().push(); db.session.execute(text('SELECT 1')); print('DB connection OK')" || echo 'DB check skipped'
